ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR((ISCHANGED( Insolvency_Status__c ) && ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c , 'Withdrawn')&& ISNULL( Insolvency_Withdrawn_Date__c )), (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c , 'Withdrawn')&& ISCHANGED( Insolvency_Withdrawn_Date__c )&& ISNULL(Insolvency_Withdrawn_Date__c )), false)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Withdrawn Date is mandatory as Insolvency Status moved to Withdrawn
